title: Reverse Armor
description: Reverses Armor into items in which they were crafted in.
body:
## About This Datapack
Sometimes it is annoying when you craft accidently five pairs of boots while you only need one. This Datapack gives the player ability to reverse that just by using crafting table.

To install:
1. Download the zip file
2. Now go to your world folder, click on it and you'll find a folder named "datapacks" paste the zip/folder of this Data pack in there

Also try: [AutoTree](https://modrinth.com/datapack/auto-tree)
